info.title: Essenza Access Control API
info.description: API para gestión de control de acceso, permisos, roles, usuarios y navegación

get.description: Returns a user by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing user by ID

get.description: Returns a profile by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing profile by ID

get.description: Returns a company by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing company by ID

get.description: Returns a client by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing client by ID

get.description: Returns all users. Optional filter by username
Returns all profiles. Optional filter by userId
Returns all companies. Optional filters: name, nit
Returns all clients. Optional filter by cardId

post.description: Validate token and return user information for cross-project validation
Generate new access token from refresh token
Login with username and password to get JWT token
Authenticate employee user and get JWT tokens
Authenticate client user and get JWT tokens
Validate user credentials without generating tokens
Internal login endpoint using LoginUseCase directly

get.description: Returns all companies assigned to a user
Returns active and non-expired companies for a user
Returns all users assigned to a company
Returns active and non-expired users for a company
Check if employee authentication service is available
Check if client authentication service is available
Check if internal authentication service is available

error.description: Error message if token is invalid

LoginResponse.description: Login response with JWT token and user information
